_note: Personal Microsoft account (MSA). No corporate SharePoint tenant found on this machine.
_note2: For personal OneDrive via SharePoint REST API you need an app registered at https://portal.azure.com — see README below.
_client_id_note: Register an app at https://portal.azure.com > App registrations > New. Add delegated permission 'Files.ReadWrite' (Microsoft Graph). Set redirect URI to 'http://localhost'. Paste the Application (client) ID below.
_sharepoint_url_note: For personal OneDrive the REST host is your 'mysite' URL. Discover it by going to https://onedrive.live.com, clicking your name top-right > OneDrive settings and copying the URL (looks like https://pernielsen-my.sharepoint.com/personal/per_nielsen1_outlook_com). Alternatively run: Get-PnPContext in PnP PowerShell after connecting.
